scope: Identify nexus consumers of qmirror in-tree modules; refactor router to delegate to standalone qmirror CLI.

code_files.refactor_action: rewrite as shellout pass-through to standalone qmirror CLI

spec_files.refactor_action: no change required (descriptive only); accurate after refactor as router still owns dispatch

test_files.ref: exercises CLI=cli/qmirror.hexa for qrng subcmd outputs
test_files.refactor_action: no change required (CLI surface preserved byte-equivalent for qrng JSON)

in_tree_modules_status.reason: DEPRECATED but retained as fallback if standalone qmirror CLI is not resolvable. Resolution order in router puts standalone first; legacy invoked only with stderr WARN.

consumers_found.marker_files_skipped: state/markers/qmirror_*, qrng_*, chsh_* — historical run records, not consumers

smoke_tests.evidence: verdict PASS (8/8) emitted; 5 caveats from standalone surfaced
F5 cond.6 reproduce all 4 systems byte-identical match; pass:true

constraints_honored.raw_15: write-confined: only nexus/cli/qmirror.hexa modified, audit log appended; in-tree modules untouched
constraints_honored.raw_10: 4 honest C3 caveats embedded in cmd_help

caveats_c3: 1. qmirror standalone CLI must be reachable via one of 4 resolution paths; if missing, router falls back to DEPRECATED in-tree modules with stderr WARN — silent if PATH/env unset and in-tree dir present.
2. Version-pinning concern: router does NOT pin a qmirror version; consumers depending on a specific qmirror schema/output should pin via QMIRROR_ROOT to a known revision.

3. Refactor parity verified for 6 subcmds in mock mode only; real-QPU vendors (chsh --vendor=ionq with API key), qrng live ANU, and exotic flag combinations not exhaustively swept — drift may surface in edge cases.

4. nexus repo write succeeded (not sandboxed); changes applied in-place to /Users/ghost/core/nexus/cli/qmirror.hexa. If a future sandbox blocks writes, the refactored file is preserved at state/nexus_qmirror_cli_refactor_2026_05_03/qmirror.hexa.after for re-application.
